docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,003.98 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CAR CARE INC. DBA MISSION TIRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED MAR-26-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CAR CARE INC. DBA MISSION TIRES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CAR CARE INC. DBA MISSION TIRES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN SANTOS, PARTS MANAGER. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CAR CARE INC. DBA MISSION TIRES REPRESENTED BY JACK RHIEL, PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
